NO OPPOSITION. NO OTHER SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM ROBERT KANE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Deft Paul H Bunch
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., 510.985.9250, for Plaintiff Portfolio Recovery Associates, LLC; no other appearances.

Ruling: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC's Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admission Of Truth Of Facts Be Admitted And For Monetary Sanction Against Defendant Paul H Bunch is Granted. No opposition. No other sanctions. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem Robert Kane, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
